ai_summary: Aarvi Encon Limited has announced its 38th Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held virtually on August 14, 2026, where a dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, may be declared. The record date for dividend eligibility is set for August 07, 2026, with payments, if approved, to be disbursed within 30 days of the AGM. This is a standard regulatory update for a listed entity, primarily impacting shareholders eligible for potential dividend distribution, and contains no apparent red flags.
